---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Kehuan Wang"
date: "2026-04-26"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(glmnet)

input_cat <- "drug_consumption_transformed.csv"
input_num <- "drug_consumption_numeric.csv"

output_dir <- "data"
if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) dir.create(output_dir)

class_order <- c("CL0", "CL1", "CL2", "CL3", "CL4", "CL5", "CL6")

alphas <- seq(0, 1, 0.1)

# from large lambda to small lambda
lambdas <- rev(10^seq(-4, 2, by = 0.5))

nfolds <- 5
set.seed(432)
```

```{r}
encode_response <- function(y) {
  as.integer(factor(y, levels = class_order, ordered = TRUE)) - 1
}

make_folds_stratified <- function(y, k) {
  folds <- integer(length(y))
  for (cls in unique(y)) {
    idx <- which(y == cls)
    folds[idx] <- sample(rep(1:k, length.out = length(idx)))
  }
  folds
}
```

```{r}
df_cat <- read.csv(input_cat, stringsAsFactors = TRUE)

y_cat <- encode_response(df_cat$choc)

X_cat <- model.matrix(
  ~ age + gender + education + country + ethnicity +
    nscore + escore + oscore + ascore + cscore - 1,
  df_cat
)

cat("Categorical data loaded.\n")
dim(X_cat)
table(y_cat)
```

```{r}
df_num <- read.csv(input_num, stringsAsFactors = TRUE)

y_num <- encode_response(df_num$choc)

X_num <- model.matrix(
  ~ age + gender + education + country + ethnicity +
    nscore + escore + oscore + ascore + cscore - 1,
  df_num
)

cat("Numeric data loaded.\n")
dim(X_num)
table(y_num)
```

```{r}
stopifnot(all(y_cat == y_num))

write.csv(
  data.frame(
    class = 0:6,
    label = class_order,
    count = as.integer(table(factor(y_cat, levels = 0:6)))
  ),
  file.path(output_dir, "response_distribution.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
run_multinomial <- function(X, y, label) {
  n <- nrow(X)
  y_factor <- factor(y, levels = 0:6, labels = class_order)
  folds <- make_folds_stratified(y, nfolds)

  grid <- expand.grid(alpha = alphas, lambda = lambdas)
  grid$log10_lambda <- log10(grid$lambda)
  grid$grid_id <- 0:(nrow(grid) - 1)

  pred_mat <- matrix(NA_integer_, nrow = nrow(grid), ncol = n)

  for (a in seq_along(alphas)) {
    alpha_g <- alphas[a]
    grid_idx <- which(grid$alpha == alpha_g)

    for (fold in 1:nfolds) {
      train_idx <- which(folds != fold)
      test_idx <- which(folds == fold)

      X_train <- X[train_idx, , drop = FALSE]
      X_test <- X[test_idx, , drop = FALSE]
      y_train <- droplevels(y_factor[train_idx])

      fit <- tryCatch(
        glmnet(
          x = X_train,
          y = y_train,
          family = "multinomial",
          alpha = alpha_g,
          lambda = lambdas,
          standardize = TRUE,
          maxit = 1e6
        ),
        error = function(e) {
          message(sprintf("glmnet failed for %s | alpha = %.1f | fold = %d",
                          label, alpha_g, fold))
          return(NULL)
        }
      )

      if (is.null(fit)) next

      pred_array <- predict(
        fit,
        newx = X_test,
        type = "class",
        s = lambdas
      )

      if (length(dim(pred_array)) == 3) {
        for (j in seq_along(lambdas)) {
          pred_j <- pred_array[, 1, j]
          pred_j <- as.character(pred_j)
          pred_mat[grid_idx[j], test_idx] <- match(pred_j, class_order) - 1
        }

      } else if (is.matrix(pred_array)) {
        for (j in seq_along(lambdas)) {
          pred_j <- pred_array[, j]
          pred_j <- as.character(pred_j)
          pred_mat[grid_idx[j], test_idx] <- match(pred_j, class_order) - 1
        }

      } else {
        stop("Unexpected shape returned by predict().")
      }

      cat(sprintf("%s | alpha=%.1f | fold %d/%d complete\n",
                  label, alpha_g, fold, nfolds))
    }
  }

  write.csv(
    data.frame(true = y),
    file.path(output_dir, paste0("multinomial_true_", label, ".csv")),
    row.names = FALSE
  )

  write.csv(
    grid,
    file.path(output_dir, paste0("multinomial_grid_", label, ".csv")),
    row.names = FALSE
  )

  write.csv(
    pred_mat,
    file.path(output_dir, paste0("multinomial_pred_", label, ".csv")),
    row.names = FALSE
  )
}
```

```{r}
cat("Running categorical multinomial model...\n")
run_multinomial(X_cat, y_cat, "cat")
```

```{r}
cat("Running numeric multinomial model...\n")
run_multinomial(X_num, y_num, "num")
```
